/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Hamiltonians/elliptictrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Hamiltonians/rbminteractrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/InitialStates/initialstate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/RBMsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Solvers/importancesampling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Solvers/metropolis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Solvers/montecarlo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/boltzmannmachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/utilities.cpp.o -o vmc  /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
